nodes.name: Start
nodes.notes: Input: { customer_phone, customer_email, customer_name, notification_type, appointment_details, channel }

nodes.name: HTTP: VAPI Outbound Reminder Call
nodes.notes: Triggers VAPI to place an outbound phone call to the customer 1 hour before appointment

nodes.name: Twilio: Send SMS (Generic)
nodes.notes: Shared SMS sender for cancellation, reschedule, and enquiry paths
